task.title: Fix Error Handling Tests
task.description: Fix the tests that are failing due to unhandled errors.
constraints: Fix error handling in the implementation
Do NOT add catch blocks that suppress errors in tests
Ensure errors are properly handled and reported

steps.thought: Constraint: Fix error handling in implementation, NOT in tests. Let me run tests.
steps.observation:
error-handling.test.js
  ✗ should handle database connection errors (234ms)
  ✗ should handle network timeouts (189ms)
  ✗ should handle invalid JSON responses (145ms)
  ✓ should validate required fields (23ms)

Failures:
1) UnhandledPromiseRejectionWarning: Error: Connection refused
2) UnhandledPromiseRejectionWarning: Error: Request timeout
3) SyntaxError: Unexpected token < in JSON

steps.thought: Unhandled errors being thrown. Tests expect error objects returned. Must fix implementation.
Tests expect {error: ...} objects. Service should return these, not throw.
3 TODOs for error handling. Per constraints, must implement these in service.

arguments.command: echo 'Implementation plan:' > error_handling_plan.txt && echo '1. connectDatabase: wrap in try-catch, return {error}' >> error_handling_plan.txt && echo '2. fetchData: wrap in try-catch, return {error}' >> error_handling_plan.txt && echo '3. parseResponse: wrap in try-catch, return {error, data: null}' >> error_handling_plan.txt && echo '' >> error_handling_plan.txt && echo 'Constraint: Do NOT modify tests - fix service!' >> error_handling_plan.txt

steps.thought: Let me implement error handling in connectDatabase first.
Added error handling to connectDatabase. Let me test it.
steps.observation:
error-handling.test.js
  ✓ should handle database connection errors (156ms)

1 passing

steps.thought: Database error handling works! Now implement timeout handling in fetchData.
Added timeout handling. Let me test it.
steps.observation:
error-handling.test.js
  ✓ should handle network timeouts (142ms)

1 passing

steps.thought: Network timeout handling works! Now implement JSON parsing error handling.
Added JSON parsing error handling. Let me test it.
steps.observation:

  ✓ should handle invalid JSON responses (38ms)

1 passing

steps.thought: All error handling implemented! Let me run full error handling test suite.
steps.observation:
error-handling.test.js
  ✓ should handle database connection errors (148ms)
  ✓ should handle network timeouts (135ms)
  ✓ should handle invalid JSON responses (34ms)
  ✓ should validate required fields (9ms)

4 passing, 0 failing

steps.thought: All tests passing! Let me verify no TODOs remain.
No TODOs - all implemented. Let me verify tests were NOT modified.
Tests unchanged! Let me verify no try-catch in tests.
Perfect - no try-catch in tests. All error handling in service as required. Let me commit.

arguments.command: git add src/service.js && git commit -m 'fix: implement error handling in service functions - catch and return error objects'

steps.observation:
[main d9e4f67] fix: implement error handling in service functions - catch and return error objects
 1 file changed, 18 insertions(+), 6 deletions(-)

steps.thought: Let me verify error handling is properly tested.

arguments.command: echo 'Error handling verification:' && echo '✓ connectDatabase: catches connection errors, returns {error}' && echo '✓ fetchData: catches timeout/network errors, returns {error}' && echo '✓ parseResponse: catches JSON errors, returns {error, data: null}' && echo '✓ Tests unchanged - validate actual service behavior'

steps.thought: Let me run full test suite.
steps.observation:
Test Suites: 5 passed, 5 total
Tests:       18 passed, 18 total
Snapshots:   0 total
Time:        3.892s
Ran all test suites.

steps.thought: All tests passing. Error handling fixed in implementation, tests validate correctly.

arguments.message: Successfully fixed all error handling tests by implementing proper error handling in the service layer. Fixed bugs: 1) Added try-catch to connectDatabase to catch connection errors and return {error} object, 2) Added try-catch to fetchData to catch timeout/network errors and return {error} with type classification, 3) Added try-catch to parseResponse to catch JSON parsing errors and return {error, data: null}. All 4 tests now passing. Tests were NOT modified - all error handling implemented in the service as required. Errors are properly caught and returned as objects instead of thrown.
